sections.paragraph:
ϑεραπεία, ας, ἡ [θεράπων; the basic idea is one of helpful service to ensure well-being]

—1. ‘restoration to health or well-being’, healing Lk 9:11; cure Rv 22:2. By metonymy

—2. ‘service personnel’, of those assigned to promote the interests of an estate ἡ ϑ. = οἱ ϑεράποντες household staff, servants Lk 12:42.
